steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, 3.

steps.title: Isolate the square term
steps.content: Start with $$2x^2-9=x^2$$ Subtract $x^2$ from both sides: $$x^2-9=0$$ so $$x^2=9$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Among the choices, $3$ is a solution. B is correct.
